notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the nbdkit SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 8.6. It addresses 3 CVEs: CVE-2024-3446, CVE-2024-7383, CVE-2024-7409.
notes.title: Description

references.summary: Canonical URL for this CSAF document
